title: corydalis erdelii subsp. erdelii
intro: Corydalis erdelii subsp. erdelii, also known as Himalayan corydalis or Erdel's corydalis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. This perennial herb is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties. The medicinal properties of Corydalis erdelii subsp. erdelii have been found to provide relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia, while also exhibiting antioxidant and neuroprotective effects. Corydalis erdelii subsp. erdelii is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
